body:
Diego, thanks for looping me in on this — I've been watching [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) closely since their seed round closed earlier this year and I think the timing for a conversation is right. Their grid-balancing stack is genuinely differentiated from what I've seen out of other climate infra plays at this stage, and the team's background in FERC policy gives them an edge most founders in this space don't have. I'd be open to co-leading the Series A if the terms come together the way you described; [Halfway Capital](firms/halfway-capital) has been looking to add more transmission and storage infrastructure to the portfolio anyway. Can we set up a three-way intro call sometime the week of December 8th?

Amara
